repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §1 contains linear FWL/sign-flip panel results, not a unit-FE PPML pseudo-true derivative identity with endogenous mean weights.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1, equation (3.6) gives the two-individual, three-period PPML wrong-comparison calculation, but not the general collapsed-score derivative formula.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no active in-catalogue proposal eliminates PPML fitted margins into a primitive multicohort zero-level characterization.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1 is a 2x3 calculation; GoodmanBacon2021 and deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE give linear-TWFE decompositions, not a finite primitive characterization of the PPML zero-level set.

soundness_flags.label: ass:cohort-share-limit together with ass:multicohort-frontier-scope
soundness_flags.one_line: Requiring n_gN>0 for every g and every N is inconsistent once C contains {2,3,4,infinity}: four nonempty cohorts cannot exist for N<4; define the triangular array only for N>=|C| (or an explicit cofinal index set).

soundness_flags.label: ass:within-cohort-baseline-limit
soundness_flags.one_line: The deterministic convergence of cohort averages is not a standard 'triangular-array within-cell mean convergence' condition supported by Andrews1988LLN, which instead supplies LLNs under mixingale conditions; retag it as a direct array condition or state a sampling/mixing route that derives it.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: honest_scope / hat_beta_N
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: No fixed-T consistency, limit distribution, or inference result is claimed for the extended-MLE sample convention.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The contribution is conditional on the stated population projection: unit-FE collapse, derivative sign identity, and W4 reversal witness only.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Index the array by N>=|C| and give a complete W4 allocation for nonmultiples of four, or explicitly formulate all limits along N divisible by four.

Replace the Andrews-tagged deterministic baseline-average condition with primitive sampling assumptions plus an LLN, or present it transparently as an imposed deterministic triangular-array regularity condition.
Add a corollary comparing the unsafe pooled PPML region to MoreauKastler2025PTT's corrected ratio-of-ratios estimator, so the diagnostic yields a concrete reporting or replacement rule.

recommended_next_step: Revise the two assumption specifications, retain the accepted population-only scope, then advance this field-tier PPML geometry angle to Stage 0.
